name: Mushroom Spring Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chinese rice wine or sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried Chinese mushrooms in hot water to cover for 30 minutes.
2. Wipe and trim the fresh mushrooms, discarding the stems.
3. Finely chop both the fresh and dried mushrooms.
4. Mix all remaining ingredients except spring roll wrappers, egg white, and oil.
5. Let the mixture stand at room temperature for fifteen minutes.
6. Place each spring roll wrapper on a work surface. Fill with an equal amount of the mixture. Brush the uncovered part with egg white. Fold in two corners across the filling and roll up tightly from one unfolded corner, dampening the last corner, and pressing to secure.
7. Heat oil in a deep pan until very hot. Fry 3-4 rolls at a time, turning occasionally with a skimmer or slotted spoon. Cook until golden brown.
